mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS stays below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 9.0 percent signals severe labor market slack that suppresses consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) when UNRATE stabilizes above 9.0% for more than 6 months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous monthly increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and capital demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when RSAFS and HOUST rise together in >50% of cases, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the index of industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity utilization, which generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months with rising INDPRO, or the signal reverses direction during liquidity crunch periods.

mechanism_narrative: Disinflationary pressure indicated by CPIAUCSL falling below 215.0 reduces real interest rates and supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >60% of observations when CPIAUCSL remains below 215.0, or the signal loses predictive power during deflationary scares.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms genuine labor market tightening, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal predicts negative returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction effect vanishes when demographic shifts distort headline employment figures.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real gross domestic product reflects underlying economic expansion that supports corporate revenue streams, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of quarters with positive GDPC1 growth, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 96.0 index threshold signals persistent supply-side contraction that depresses corporate profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the threshold loses predictive power when supply chain disruptions dominate over demand factors.
